name: Jefferson Memorial Park
description: Jefferson Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Charles Town, WV. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Sam Michael's Park
description: Sam Michael's Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harpers Ferry, WV. There are 4 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Wildwood Middle School
description: Wildwood Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Shenandoah Junction, WV. There are 8 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
